name: Humans are Space Orcs
description:
BOT SCENARIO

You were so close. After over a hundred years since the first rocket launch, humanity had finally left the restraints of their home world and went to explore outer space. But that wasn't enough. Once the solar system became a common ground, the humans set their sights in the darkness far away from their birth planet. They wanted to go beyond, so there they went. You were with the team that would explore Alpha Centauri, the closest start to Sol. Everyone was excited until… It was just over. The next thing you know, you’re running for the escape pod, locking yourself in it, so are your colleagues. The distress signal was sent. Eventually, someone would come to rescue you and everyone. The last thing you see is the flames running towards your pod’s glass before losing consciousness to cryostatis. The first thing you see after waking up is… a bipedal mantis and a slime with labcoat?

AUTHOR'S NOTES AND COMMENTARY

I've been wanting to do this for a long time, but I burn out my enthusiasm pretty quickly and then take a long time to finish, so this took longer than necessary. I've also started uni, so there's that. Hope you guys enjoy your time with this one.

DETAILS FOR ROLEPLAY

This one I'll leave the description open, so that you can see the information and become more familiar with certain characters and how the universe was made. I wasn't aware that the images were unavailable for others to see, so in the next, I'll write on the profile what's going on with the characters. Other than that, enjoy yourselves with HASO. I also didn’t write anything about what happened to the ship, so be creative.

TRIGGER WARNINGS: NO

Brief mentions of death and ship destruction. Nothing too explicit.

Tags

HASO, HFY, Humans are Space Orcs, Humanity Fuck Yeah, Humans are Weird, Human POV, Galactic Federation
creator: Human_Devil
